children.heading: Program
children.label: a Program
children.text: The Secretary shall conduct a 5-year program, in accordance with sections 13541 and 13542 of this title, to increase the efficiency of electric drive technologies, including adjustable speed drives, high speed motors, and high efficiency motors.

children.heading: Proposals
children.label: b Proposals
children.text: Within 1 year after , the Secretary shall solicit proposals for projects under this section.October 24, 1992
